spec_match.rationale: chrome-devtools-mcp verified the page's real probe opens popover=auto first and then popover=hint; Chrome Canary 151 kept both elements :popover-open, matching the Chrome 150 coexistence contract.

interactive.rationale: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp: clicked File to open the auto menu, hovered Search to open the hint, and observed the event log record that the hint opened while the auto menu remained open.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned beautifully with the parent index listing blurb.

edge_cases.rationale: The support state distinguishes basic Popover API support, hint value reflection, actual auto-then-hint coexistence, and live event log evidence.

references.rationale: The see also block now includes the official ChromeStatus feature link, verified in chrome-devtools-mcp.

design_system.rationale: Fits seamlessly: matching dark toolbar styling, compact layouts, and light border frames.

summary: chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 with Chrome Canary 151.0.0.0 verified the File menu plus Search tooltip coexist path, clean console, ChromeStatus link presence, and the feature conformance route reporting 6 PASS / 0 FAIL.
